description: npm ci completed successfully from package-lock.json; package.json and package-lock.json checksums were unchanged; npm reported deprecation warnings and 57 audit vulnerabilities.
npx hardhat compile succeeded and generated Groth16Verifier artifact.
Full Hardhat suite and targeted core tests passed.
Demo proof fixture was accepted by Solidity verifier; zero, tampered, and invalid-public-input checks were rejected.
npx snarkjs groth16 verify verification_key.json public.json proof.json returned OK.
Fresh proof generation from circuit source is not reproducible because access.wasm is missing.
Fresh proof generation from circuit source is not reproducible because the final proving key is missing.
verifyProof estimated at 214410 gas and verifyProofAndEmit estimated at 220611 gas on Hardhat network.
Verifier deployment worked; production retrieval workflows failed at IPFS upload because the IPFS API daemon was unavailable.
Scenario 1 redirected CSV was created with header only before IPFS failure.
Experiment scripts were inspected and diagnosed; only scenario1-valid-proof was attempted and failed due IPFS.
